The patch tried to add after line 20, but the actual structure has changed. The safest approach is to add a new entry at the end of the file. ``` So "Today" is on line 27 (the `` line) and "Last wake" is on line 31. Let me create a proper diff. I'll add to MEMORY.md at the end (after line 22) and update the site stats.
